title: Dillon's modpackK!
description: pvp enhanced and a huge fps boost!
body:
Dillon's PvP Modpack and Resource Pack for FPS Boost

This custom modpack will help you get the most out of your Minecraft experience and give you an edge in PvP. You can double your FPS with my resource pack and tweaks, which will make combat smoother and more responsive. This pack is great for PvP players because it improves hit registration, visibility, and gameplay mechanics without changing the core Minecraft experience.

Things to look for:

FPS Boosts: Mods and settings that make the game run faster and smoother.

PvP Improvements: Hitboxes that work better, more responsive controls, and changes that make combat easier.

Custom Resource Pack: Looks great without slowing down the game.

Quality-of-Life Mods: useful tools and better interfaces for ease of use.

Why download: It's great for players who want Minecraft to run more smoothly, quickly, and competitively, especially on PvP or anarchy servers.

Dillon Niketh
